summary: Verified two user-requested changes on D2Synergy vanilla-JS app: (A) drawer menu consolidation to a single 'My Vault' row + full-screen overlay, and (B) Armor 3.0 per-slot Tier dropdown + Masterwork dropdown. All acceptance criteria from the review request PASS with 0 uncaught console errors.

test_1_drawer_menu_consolidation.details: Hamburger drawer contains exactly ONE row with data-testid='open-fullscreen-vault-row' labeled 'My Vault'. No 'Full-Screen Vault' label anywhere. No 'Load My Vault' button (old accordion removed). The word 'My Vault' occurs exactly once in the drawer.

test_2_fullscreen_vault_overlay.details: Clicking the 'My Vault' row closes the drawer and opens the full-screen overlay. Element [data-testid='vault-fullscreen-overlay'] gets class 'fsOverlay open'. Body text contains 'Not signed in' (graceful message: 'Could not load vault: Not signed in. Open the menu → Sign in with Bungie.net first.').

test_3_armor_mods_defaults.details: Panel '05 Armor Mods' contains exactly 5 slot wraps (Helmet, Arms, Chest, Legs, Class Item). Each slot has: a 'Tier' <select> with 5 options ('Tier 1 — 10 energy', 'Tier 2 — 10 energy', 'Tier 3 — 10 energy', 'Tier 4 — 11 energy', 'Tier 5 — 11 energy + tuning slot'), default selected = 5; four 'Slot 1..4' selects; 'Mod energy: 0 / 11' readout; a tuning <select> (with 'no tuning' option); a 'Masterwork' <select> with exactly 6 options ['Not masterworked','Level 1 (+1 to 3 stats)','Level 2 (+2 to 3 stats)','Level 3 (+3 to 3 stats)','Level 4 (+4 to 3 stats)','Level 5 (+5 to 3 stats)'].

test_4_tier_energy_cap_transitions_on_he.details: Helmet Tier 5→3: 'Mod energy: 0 / 10', tuning select removed, 'Stat-tuning slot unlocks at Tier 5.' note appears. Tier 3→4: 'Mod energy: 0 / 11', unlocks note STILL present (tuning is Tier-5 only), no tuning select. Tier 4→2: '/ 10' cap. Tier 2→5: '/ 11' cap, tuning select restored, unlocks note removed.

test_5_masterwork_dropdown_type_and_beha.details: Masterwork control is a <SELECT> element (NOT a checkbox). Setting level=0 hides stat checkboxes. Setting level=3 reveals 6 stat checkboxes (Weapons/Health/Class/Grenade/Super/Melee). Clicking a checkbox marks it and updates the '3 more stats to pick' hint to '2 more stats to pick' (visible in screenshot).

test_6_no_console_errors.details: Full test run (page load, drawer open, vault overlay open/close, panel expand, Tier changes 5→3→4→2→5, Masterwork 5→0→3, checkbox toggling) produced 0 console errors and 0 page errors.

critical_code_review_comments: index.html is now 4479 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting builder rendering, vault overlay, and OAuth/sync code into separate modules for maintainability. Not a bug — informational.

state.armorMasterwork default is initialized to level:5 for all 5 slots on both initial load and reset. That means every fresh build already benefits from a full masterwork on every piece before the user picks any stats. Intentional? If not, the visible '3 more stats to pick' hint on load may confuse users.

The Tier and Masterwork dropdowns lack data-testid attributes. Fine for now (tested via label-based selectors), but adding e.g. data-testid="armor-tier-helmet" / data-testid="armor-mw-helmet" would harden future automated regression tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vanilla-JS static app served from /app/frontend/public/index.html. Panel bodies have no ID — use document.getElementById('panelHead_p5').nextElementSibling to reach the '05 Armor Mods' body (a div.panel; toggle collapse by clicking the header). Slot rows use .slotrow class; label elements inside are matched by textContent. IMPORTANT: label innerText returns the CSS-uppercased visible text — use textContent for raw comparison. Also, render() replaces the DOM on every change, so any code that captures NodeList references and calls click() on multiple checkboxes back-to-back will see only the first click take effect. Vault overlay uses [data-testid='vault-fullscreen-overlay'] with class 'fsOverlay' + 'open'.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Both features implemented correctly and function as specified in the review request.
